docket_entries.description: THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR AN OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-19-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-16-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-25-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-16-2009 CONTINUED TO JAN-19-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-16-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JASON ROBINSON, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-18-2009 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-02-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LA VENA WARD, CSR#7077 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
